_source: GET https://widgets.pinterest.com/v3/pidgets/pins/info/?pin_ids=<id> (public, unauthenticated). Real STRUCTURE mirroring the captured pin-widget response, trimmed to a video pin whose `video_list` has only HLS renditions (V_HLSV4 / V_HLSV3_MOBILE) and no progressive V_720P — so the resolver must fall back to the HLS master. The companion pin-video-widget.json includes a V_720P that wins, so its V_HLSV4 fallback is never exercised; this covers it.
